title: stelis isthmi
intro: Stelis isthmi, also known as "Mangrove Orchid," is a species of orchid that grows in the mangrove forests of Central and South America, particularly in the Caribbean and northern South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Stelis isthmi include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like acne and eczema. Herbal preparations of Stelis isthmi can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
